sections.title: Fats
sections.narration: fat is 0.1g. omega 3 is doing serious work here. for a tuber, the cleanest win is a more stable carb profile.
sections.subtitleText: fat is 0.1g. omega 3 is doing serious work here. for a tuber, the cleanest win is a more stable carb profile.

sections.title: Carbs
sections.narration: carbs is 20.1g. glycemic index, fibre, and starch are doing most of the work. for tubers, the carb side decides whether the food feels stable or flimsy.

sections.title: Proteins
sections.narration: protein is 1.6g. protein quality is clearly one of the selling points. protein is usually limited here, so the other sections have to carry more.

sections.title: Vitamins
sections.narration: vitamin a at 160% DV, vitamin c at 3% DV stand out most. that gives this food real vitamin support.

sections.title: Minerals
sections.narration: potassium at 10% DV, magnesium at 6% DV, iron at 3% DV stand out most. that stays fairly limited overall.
sections.subtitleText: potassium at 10% DV, magnesium at 6% DV, iron at 3% DV stand out most. that stays fairly limited overall.

sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: on the plus side. excellent tuber-category fit because strong vitamin support and gentler carb behaviour make it one of the cleanest tuber-category foods. fairly filling for the calories because a practical strength for an energy food. easy to use as a wholefood staple because works cleanly in meals without needing much rescue from toppings or processing.

sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: the drawbacks next. naturally sweeter than some tubers because still fine, but it is not the lowest-sugar energy food in the category. healthiness depends on preparation because heavy added fats or sugary toppings can change the practical outcome. protein contribution is light because like most tubers, it is not doing much in the protein lane.

closing.summary: Sweet Potato stands out for excellent tuber-category fit and fairly filling for the calories. but it also gets held back by naturally sweeter than some tubers and healthiness depends on preparation. Best when you want practical carbs and the rest of the profile is still reasonably clean.
